title: chionanthus subsessilis
intro: Chionanthus subsessilis is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly known as the fringed tree or the Chinese fringed shrub. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chionanthus subsessilis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
